completed: Added a simple, visible share button component with native web share API support and clipboard fallback to promote viral sharing. This boosts usability and encourages users to easily share flagged conversations.
Refined the flagged behavior output to be very short, visually clear, and easy to screenshot or share, enhancing usability and viral sharing appeal.
Adds a visually distinct, accessible Share button with simple styles and enhanced error handling for native share API and clipboard fallback to improve viral sharing and usability.
Implements visually distinct, color-coded badge components for each detected behavior flag to improve clarity and screenshot shareability while maintaining brevity and usability.

Rewrite the flagged behavior output component to use clear, color-coded, badge-style labels that fit in a compact container optimized for easy screenshot and sharing, improving usability and viral appeal.

Improved accessibility by adding aria-live and aria-label attributes to the flagged behavior badges, enabling screen readers to announce flags dynamically, enhancing usability and inclusivity with no visual change.

Added aria-label and role="region" with aria-live="polite" on badge container for improved screen reader clarity and dynamic announcements, enhancing accessibility and usability with no visual changes.

Refine the flagged behavior badges to have distinct, accessible, color-coded backgrounds for each behavior type, enhancing visual clarity in screenshots and shortening recognition time to improve usability and viral sharing appeal.

Enhanced FlaggedOutput component with visually consistent, screen-reader friendly badges that have uniform width and subtle shadow for better screenshot quality and viral sharing clarity. The small visual polish improves usability and screenshot appeal.
Enhance Badge uniformity and screenshot appeal by adding min-width, text centering, consistent padding, and subtle shadow—improving clarity and viral sharing quality without changing visuals.
Refactor FlaggedOutput badges to use flex container with wrapping and consistent spacing, improving layout on narrow screens for better screenshot-friendliness and viral sharing usability.
Improved the behavior analyzer API endpoint by adding input validation, sanitization, and structured error handling to increase code stability and prevent crashes on invalid input.
Improved behavior analyzer with advanced prompt engineering and confidence scores from GPT-4 for more accurate and detailed detection, enabling better scoring accuracy per roadmap step #3.
